name: beardrive
description: BearDrive — the open-source Google Drive for AI agents: one folder your team and their agents share, with per-change attribution and read analytics.

plugins.name: beardrive
plugins.description: BearDrive: folders that stay in sync across your team and agents through a self-hostable BearDrive hub, with per-file history and public share links. Installs the beardrive skill, /beardrive:install, /beardrive:init and /beardrive:status commands, and turn-boundary sync hooks in one step.
